steps.title: Compare the ABA effects
steps.content: The first sentence says ABA slows biological processes in most plants. The next sentence says ABA causes accelerated growth in Schrenkiella parvula. The relationship is opposition: slowdown versus acceleration.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast transitions
steps.content: A would add supporting information rather than introduce an exception. C would make the mustard plant an example of the slowdown pattern, which it is not. D would make accelerated growth a consequence of the general slowdown rule. The answer is B.
